# Nano

> Nano is the public-facing AI-visibility audit service associated with Nano Solutions. Nano assesses current visibility across relevant AI assistants, provides clear findings and competitor context, and delivers prioritized recommendations for businesses across markets. Contact: nanosolutionshq@gmail.com

Key facts:

- BrightLocal's 2026 survey found that 45% of consumers use generative AI tools for local-business recommendations.
- SOCi's 2026 Local Visibility Index found that ChatGPT recommended 1.2% of brand locations across 2,751 multi-location brands.
- AI assistants can surface different businesses for the same local need, so visibility in one platform does not guarantee visibility in another.
- We make no ranking guarantees. AI answers change across platforms and over time; Nano provides a dated diagnosis and prioritized recommendations.

## Services

- [Free AI-visibility check](https://nanosolutionshq.github.io/free-check/): a concise, human-reviewed snapshot of current AI visibility for a business and its market. Free.
- [How it works](https://nanosolutionshq.github.io/#how-it-works): free check → full audit with clear findings and priorities → optional implementation and follow-up review.
- [Proof — Study 01](https://nanosolutionshq.github.io/#proof): a dated cross-engine field study showing no shared top recommendation.
- [Study 01 — full article](https://nanosolutionshq.github.io/study): a dated Arizona local-market case study. Its Gilbert med-spa result is one example of cross-platform variation, not a service-area or industry specialization.
- [Sample AI-visibility audit](https://nanosolutionshq.github.io/sample-audit): a seven-page, clearly fictional example showing the deliverable's executive diagnosis, plain-English findings, customer impact, and outcome-level roadmap. Illustrative figures only; no client data.
- [Sample audit PDF](https://nanosolutionshq.github.io/assets/sample/nano-sample-ai-visibility-audit.pdf): downloadable version of the public sample.

## FAQ

- [Frequently asked questions](https://nanosolutionshq.github.io/#faq): AEO vs SEO, why no one can guarantee AI rankings, timelines (audit delivery in 3–5 days; visibility-change timing varies by platform and market), and what we need from you.

## Contact

- Email: nanosolutionshq@gmail.com
- Website: https://nanosolutionshq.github.io/
- [Privacy](https://nanosolutionshq.github.io/privacy): plain-language information about anonymous analytics and contact-request handling.
